title: Cobblemon Picnic
description: A Cobblemon add-on that introduces Picnic Tables, allowing players to force natural spawns and boost shiny rates for targeted hunting.
body:
# 🧺 Cobblemon Picnic

**A Cobblemon add-on that turns spawn-hunting into a cozy picnic.** Place a **Picnic Table**,
right-click it, and it **despawns the nearby wild Pokémon and forces a fresh "maximized" natural
respawn** around you — a **spawn re-roller** for hunting shinies or a specific species without
roaming the world. It's also a **social station** with a shiny bonus, Pokémon care, and battles.

> Requires **Cobblemon 1.7.x** · **Fabric API** · **Fabric Language Kotlin**.
> **Mod Menu + Cloth Config** are optional (only for the in-game settings screen).

---

## ✨ Features

### 🎲 Spawn re-roll
Right-click the table to **despawn nearby wild Pokémon** (never your own/owned ones) and **spawn a
fresh batch** around it. How many you get per reroll is set in the table's GUI, capped per tier.
The search radius scales with the tier (**32 → 64 blocks**).

### 🏕️ Four table tiers
| Tier | Spawn cap | Radius | Seats | Notes |
|------|:---------:|:------:|:-----:|-------|
| **Basic** | 5 | 32 | 2 | costs the most fuel |
| **Camping** | 8 | 48 | 3 | |
| **Glamping** | 12 | 64 | 4 | no fuel; unlocks the **Battle Seeker** slot |
| **Diving** | 12 | 64 | 4 | **placed underwater only** |

### ✨ Shiny aura
**Sit on the benches** to raise shiny odds on your next reroll — **more people seated ⇒ more aura**.
It shows as a **ring of particles above the table** and a **"Shiny Aura" buff in your HUD** with a
numeric **level**. Fully toggleable in config.

### 🐾 Pokémon care (Cobblemon interaction wheel)
- **Wash** a Pokémon with a **wet sponge** → +friendship.
- **Play** with a **slime ball** → throw / fetch / return animation, +friendship, small chance the
  ball breaks (0.5 s cooldown).

### 🍱 Snacks, baskets & battles
- **poke_snack bias** — if a seasoned snack is nearby, the reroll **respects its spawn influence**
  and consumes **one bite** of the closest snack.
- **Picnic baskets** — placeable furniture in every apricorn color; **store bread inside**, and a
  nearby table will **pull bread from baskets** to power its rerolls.
- **Battle Seeker** — a **rare item found in world chests** (no recipe). Drop it in a **Glamping**
  table's fuel slot and the reroll **summons an RCT trainer**, level-matched to your party.

### 🎨 Make it yours
- Tables craft in **every cloth color × bench wood** combination, rendered with the mod's **own
  models and textures** — no other furniture mod required to look right.
- **Flammable** tables (they burn like planks).

### 📊 Quality of life
- **Statistics** — per-reroll log + aggregates (species, nature, IVs, sex, shiny, level, snacks…),
  viewable in-game.
- **In-game config** via **Mod Menu → Cloth Config** and via command.

---

## 🎮 Commands

- **`/cobblemonpicnicstats`** — summary for everyone (rerolls, spawned/despawned, **shinies** with
  ratio, legendaries/mythicals, snacks, rarest/most-common species). `reset` for operators.
- **`/cobblemonpicnicconfig`** *(operator)* — `get` · `reload` · `reset` · `set <param> <value>`
  for spawn caps, fuel cost, light, shiny-aura tuning, wash/slime-ball, trainer level, and more.

---

## 📦 Compatibility

- **Minecraft 1.21.1**, **Fabric**.
- *NeoForge support is in development* — follow the project for updates.

## 📜 License
Custom — **"If you make money, I make money."** Free to use and share for free; commercial use
requires a revenue-share agreement with the author. Table/bench models & textures were adapted from
**CobbleFurnies** and **Handcrafted** — check their licenses before redistributing.
